title: Wikidata round-trip (push reconciled ROR/ORCID/Funder links)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Reconciled, human-confirmed ROR/ORCID/Funder Registry links are pushed back to Wikidata (CC0) to strengthen the open-data graph.
objective: Push reconciled ROR/ORCID/Crossref Funder Registry links to Wikidata under CC0, reversibly and provenance-preserving, pushing only verified links.
acceptanceCriteria: Reconciled ROR/ORCID/Crossref Funder Registry links pushed to Wikidata under CC0 terms.
Round-trip is reversible and provenance-preserving; only verified/human-confirmed links pushed.
No ranking or interpretive claims added; edits follow Wikidata norms.
output: data/wikidata-roundtrip/ pushed-link records + log, committed via PR.
